name: Ducon Infratechnolgies Limited
summary: Ducon Infratechnolgies Limited provides technology solutions to the digital and infrastructure business sectors in India. The company offers distribution, marketing, and logistics services for the information technology (IT) industries. It also provides servers, storages, desktops, laptops, PDAs, tablets, security and surveillance products, and energy management systems, as well as procurement and sourcing solutions. In addition, the company installs flue gas desulfurization systems. Further, it engages in installation of industrial machinery and equipment. The company was formerly known as Dynacons Technologies Limited and changed its name to Ducon Infratechnolgies Limited May 2016. Ducon Infratechnolgies Limited was incorporated in 2009 and is based in Thane, India.
